entries.title: Jeremiah 26:15
entries.author: R. A. Torrey (editor)
entries.content:
1 Habakkuk, in his prayer, trembles at God's majesty. 17 The confidence of his faith.

prayer. Ps 86:1-17; *title Ps 90:1-17; *title upon Shigionoth. or, according to variable songs, or tunes,called in Hebrew, Shigionoth.
